meaning: n.(天主教拉丁<<圣经>>杜埃版英译本中的)约书亚
examples: Josue said to them: Who are you? And whence came you?
So Josue going up from Galgal all the night, came upon them suddenly.
And Josue called twelve men, whom he had chosen out of the children of Israel, one out of every tribe.
But four minutes later, Josue Martinez powered in a header from Bryan Oviedo's cross.
And Josue Sierra is an associate editor and blogger for the conservative online community Townhall.com.
